more: n. m. 1. A musical mode or rāg sung at mid-day. 2. A peacock. 3. A snake; serpent 4. A frog. 5. A cloud. 6. The cry of a peacock. Sāraṅg ne sāraṅg gaho, sāraṅg bolo āë, Jo sāraṅg sāraṅg kahe, sāraṅg muṅh te jāë . Dohā. A peacock caught a snake, the clouds their thunder rolled, If but the peacock scream the snake drops from his hold. (The peacock is said to scream and dance with joy at the sound of thunder).

s. m. 1. Name of a musical mode or rāg. 2. A peacock. 3. A snake, a serpent. 4. A cloud. 5. The cry of a peacock. 6. A deer. 7. A woman. 8. Water. 9. The name of a country. 10. A lamp. 11. The Nymphæa lotus. 12. (for शार्ङ ) The bow of Vish̤ṇu. سارنگ ني سارنگ گـہيوسارنگ بوليوآي جوسارنگ سارنگ کـہي سارنگ منـہہ تين جاي Sārang ne sārang gahyo, sārang bolyo āʼe; jau sārang sārang kahe, sārang muṅh teṅ jāʼe. A peacock seized a snake; a cloud thundered: if the peacock utter his cry, the snake will escape from his mouth. (It is said to be a property of the peacock that on hearing thunder he utters a cry of pleasure and dances for joy).

Doublet of سِرِن٘ج (siriñj). Cognates Compare with Odia ସୁରଙ୍ଗ (suraṅga), Bengali সুড়ঙ্গ (śuṛoṅgo), Assamese সুৰুঙা (xuruṅa) and Punjabi سُرَن٘گ (suraṉg) / ਸੁਰੰਗ (suraṅg).

more: n. f. 1. See tir-bainī . 2. The wife of Brahma. 2. The goddess of learning; the patroness of music and the arts, and the inventor of the Sanskrit language and Deonāgrī letters. Sarsutī sadā dāhene rahe! Benediction. May the goddess of wisdom be ever on your right!

def: v.t. To move aside or away, to remove ( = sarkānā); — to make an end of, consume, expend, exhaust; — to make, perform, achieve, accomplish, effect; to complete, perfect (syn. nibāhnā and sādhnā); to array, to marshal; to tame; to mend, renew, repair, restore; to correct, improve, ameliorate; to mind, observe; — to manure; — to paint (the eyes with collyrium), apply (collyrium).
more: v. a. S. साधन 1. To accomplish; finish ( sādhnā , 1). 2. To apply (collyrium to the eyes). 1. Mā! surmā, kājal karā dharā, Mā, maiṅ nahīṅ sārtī, rī merī mā! Wom. song. The antimony, lamp-black both are here. 'No, mother, no! no glossy paint I'll wear'. 2. Kājal sārūṅ das mareṅ bindī lagāūṅ bīs, Kheṅchū māṅg seṅdūr kī uṭh gin pūre tīs! Dohá. Lamp-black applied, ten slain, my spangle slays twice ten again, If I my middle-part red stain, get up, count thirty slain!
v. a. To perform, accomplish, effect, complete, make, mend, manure.
